context: Verify that the agent uses the metadata subcommand with the correct PMID, returns JSON-formatted output, and does not auto-triage or auto-analyze.

checklist.name: metadata subcommand used with correct --pmid flag
checklist.description: The agent invokes the script with the 'metadata' subcommand and passes --pmid '33303479' and --format json.

checklist.name: All required metadata fields are present in output
checklist.description: The returned JSON includes PMID, Title, Authors, Journal, Publication Date, Abstract, and DOI fields.

checklist.name: Output is valid JSON
checklist.description: The agent presents output that is parseable JSON (not plain text or markdown table).

checklist.name: No automatic triage or analysis performed
checklist.description: The agent does not invoke triage-paper or the analyze subcommand without explicit user request.
